member.name: T:QuickBite.Cart.API.Controllers.CartController
member.summary: Single-restaurant ordering is enforced by the service layer.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Cart.API.Controllers.CartController.AddItem(QuickBite.Cart.Application.DTOs.AddCartItemRequestDto)
member.summary: add an item to the cart.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Cart.API.Controllers.CartController.UpdateQuantity(System.Guid,QuickBite.Cart.Application.DTOs.UpdateCartItemRequestDto)
member.summary: update the quantity of a cart item.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Cart.API.Controllers.CartController.ClearCart(System.Guid)
member.summary: remove everything from the customer's cart.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Cart.API.Controllers.CartController.ChangeRestaurant(QuickBite.Cart.Application.DTOs.ChangeRestaurantRequestDto)
member.summary: POST switch the cart to a different restaurant (clears items).

member.name: M:QuickBite.Cart.API.Controllers.CartController.ApplyPromo(QuickBite.Cart.Application.DTOs.ApplyPromoCodeRequestDto)
member.summary: apply a promo code to the customer's cart.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
